title: How We Started
desc: In 2021, a dream was born — to transform the way Islamic gifts are shared and treasured. As-Sunnah began as more than just a brand; a vision to create gifts carrying meaning, faith, and blessings, leaving a lasting impact on both the giver and the receiver.

title: To the World
desc: We realized a gap — heartfelt Islamic gifts were missing, and well-made became the default. As-Sunnah was born as India's first Islamic gifting platform, crafting presents that count joy and serve as Sadaqah Jariyah, spreading goodness in this world and the Hereafter.

title: Tradition meets Modernity
desc: While our reach has expanded, our dedication to preserving the essence of faith, culture and crafting high-quality products, the inspiration remains at the heart of everything we do.
